task_description: Enhance the Kommunal Hisobchi Telegram bot with 4 features: (1) move secrets to .env, (2) multi-language support (Uzbek/Russian), (3) monthly PDF reports via reportlab, (4) SMS forward parsing with regex extraction.

verification.summary: All 9 Python files pass AST syntax validation. SMS parser correctly extracts reading/usage/amount from sample Uzbek SMS text. Locales module returns correct translations for both uz and ru. All features verified: .env files created, i18n implemented with get_text(), PDF report module created with generate_monthly_pdf(), SMS parser created with parse_sms().
